rulings.Case Title: EMESE TIVADAR VS. JAMIE AQUILAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT & Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 25, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT MELBA AMBROCIO, CRISTIAN MACARIO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT & Notice Of Motion is DENIED. Triable issues of fact re: space occupied by the defendant; the rental value of the space; the legality of the unit occupied by the defendants. =(501/CFH)
